name: Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound eggplant (4 cups), unpeeled, cut into 1/2 inch dice
2 medium red bell peppers (2 cups), sliced
salt & freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 teaspoons of the butter or margarine in a non-stick skillet on medium heat.
2. Add onions and eggplant and saute for 5 minutes.
3. Add zucchini, red bell peppers, and garlic and saute for another 5 minutes.
4. Push vegetables to the sides of the pan and add the remaining butter or margarine and chutney to the cleared center of the pan.
5. Add flour, cumin, and curry powder and mix well.
6. Add water and toss vegetables.
7. Cook until the sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
8. Add salt and pepper to taste.
